name: Per-Token Fixed-Point Convergence in Depth-Recurrent Transformers

description: arXiv:2607.14427v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A depth-recurrent transformer applies a weight-tied core a variable number of times, and prior work has shown that training with a randomized recursion count yields one checkpoint usable across a range of inference depths. We ask what such a model actually computes per token, and measure it directly. On a 135M-class model trained on FineWeb-Edu, t...
author: Joe Logan
